narrative: US-Iran tensions escalate over the weekend, setting up a risk-off environment for the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 157.03; may gain on safe-haven demand at the open. AUD/USD, which closed Friday at 0.7208, may extend gains on commodity bid.
